Hardware Component File

IKEY_X62_V_1_6

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference IKEY_X62_V_1_6.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 74C
Receive ID 76C
Functional Addr 2F
Functional Name IKEY

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "A10",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Associated Devices

CAN communication inferiority ID:
CAN initial diagnosis result inferiority ID:
I-KEY internal abnormality ID:
Response NG from BCM ID:
Control unit has not learned any I-Key ID:
FRONT LEFT Request SW stuck in active position ID:
FRONT RIGHT Request SW stuck in active position ID:
Back Request SW stuck in active position ID:
